• Interactive 3D Magic 8 Ball with WebGL particle animations and shaking effects
  • Supports 5 selectable response personalities (friendly, mean, silly, dramatic, roast)
  • Connects to OpenRouter API to generate brief AI answers for user questions
    const style = styleSelector.value;
    responseText.textContent = text;

This web application recreates a Magic 8 Ball with interactive 3D visuals and AI-driven responses. Users choose a personality style, input a question, and receive a brief, styled answer from the tool. The interface features animated particle effects, ball shaking animations, and smooth text transition effects.
